creator: weh@microsoft.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #20)
Vladimir committed following two on April 12:

commit e4643aa4c4ffd385a5be635a488cf10fb6d6cf68
Author: Vladimir Kondratyev <wulf@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Mon Apr 12 02:08:36 2021 +0300

    hv_kbd: Add support for K_XLATE and K_CODE modes for gen 2 VMs

    That fixes disabled keyboard input after Xorg server has been stopped.

    Reviewed by:    whu
    MFC after:      1 month
    Differential revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D28171

commit c2a159286c7694306fde8c161af47a220e1a76f2
Author: Vladimir Kondratyev <wulf@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Mon Apr 12 02:07:35 2021 +0300

    hv_kbd: Add evdev protocol support for gen 2 VMs

    Reviewed by:    whu
    MFC after:      1 month
    Differential revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D28170
